sentences.english: I was sick yesterday so I stayed home from school.
I had a sore throat and a runny nose.
My mom made me warm soup and gave me medicine.
sentences.korean: 엄마가 따뜻한 수프를 만들어주시고 약을 주셨어요.

sentences.english: I slept most of the day and watched some TV.
sentences.korean: 거의 하루 종일 자고 TV를 좀 봤어요.

sentences.english: Today I feel much better and I can go back to school tomorrow.
sentences.korean: 오늘은 훨씬 나아졌고 내일 학교에 갈 수 있어요.

quiz.question: What is the main topic of this passage?
options: How to Make Friends in a New City
